comment: DEV prompt-iteration seeds ONLY (milestone 01, task 3.2). Prompt development iterates exclusively against these five deliberately obscure Western dishes, chosen to be DISJOINT from any plausible 12-15 dish Western benchmark draft (task 4.5 / PREREGISTRATION §6) — no canonical benchmark candidate (roast chicken, bolognese, chowder, ...) appears here. Never copy these into eval/fixtures/ and never iterate prompts against benchmark seeds.

seeds.seed: savory rye porridge with mushroom broth and crispy shallots
celeriac schnitzel with caper brown butter
pan-roasted trout with sorrel butter sauce
juniper-spiced elk meatballs with braised red cabbage
parsnip and pear soup with hazelnut gremolata
